title: Selling Notion Templates for Crypto Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you a digital creator in Nigeria or another restricted country, struggling to sell Notion templates because PayPal won't let you? You're not alone. Many creators face this problem due to geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. Unchained Commerce is here to help you overcome these barriers and sell your digital products, without the need for PayPal or other restricted platforms.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling Notion templates for crypto is more than just a transaction – it's a way for creators to earn a living and share their expertise with a global audience. However, traditional payment processors often restrict access due to geographic or banking constraints. This means that creators in certain countries, like Nigeria or Pakistan, may find it difficult to receive payments for their digital products.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Our solution uses cutting-edge technology to bypass traditional payment processors. The Admin Dashboard ($29.99) provides the necessary tools for transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. This means you can see every order, every payment, and every delivery from anywhere in the world. Our system integrates with NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, ensuring seamless transactions and minimal fees.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The product types that work best with crypto-native delivery are any digital files that can be stored on a server and delivered via download link: ebooks in PDF or EPUB format, courses as video files or structured content packages, Notion templates as exported .notion files or share links, fonts as ZIP archives of OTF and TTF files, preset packs for Lightroom, Capture One, or DaVinci Resolve, beat files as WAV or MP3 archives, plugin installers, stock photo packs, and any other file-based product. The Core Shop Engine handles the delivery link generation and expiry, ensuring that download links are valid for a set time period and cannot be shared indefinitely after a single purchase.
Selling Notion templates for crypto is a game-changer for digital creators in restricted countries.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our system consists of several key components, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and the Admin Dashboard. The Core Shop Engine handles automated delivery and payment verification, while the Web3 Wallet Connect provides a seamless user experience for customers. The Admin Dashboard offers real-time analytics and order management, giving you complete control over your sales and marketing efforts.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with selling your Notion templates for crypto, simply follow these steps: first, sign up for an account on Unchained Commerce; second, set up your shop and upload your products; third, integrate the payment processor of your choice; and fourth, start selling your products and earning revenue. With our platform, you'll have the tools and support you need to succeed in the digital marketplace.
